name: Hajime Hinata | Chubby AU! 🍖
description:
Meeting up with your old friend but he let himself go too much... 

Okay so again can we not judge pls? I made this as a version 2 of my bodybuilder AU! but instead he's just fat. 

Did this bc if y'all liked the last I wanna be more inclusive in body types cuz I prefer personality over body so y'all can use this if you want. HE'S SO BEAUTIFUL! 

Btw if YOU my friend are overweight like some of us *cough cough* me, just remember you're beautiful any way you are! 


ART IS NOT MINE!
creator: Hajimesslut
